level_signals: at least 3 years at a Staff or Senior PM level
role title is Staff Product Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of product management experience, with at least 3 years at a Staff or Senior PM level at a high-growth technology company.
at least 3 years at a Staff or Senior PM level at a high-growth technology company.
Proven track record of owning and scaling complex platform or infrastructure products, ideally in enterprise SaaS, document management, knowledge management, or data-intensive domains.
Strong technical acumen with the ability to engage deeply with engineering on system design, distributed systems, data pipelines, and retrieval architectures.
Experience building products that handle sensitive data with robust security, compliance, and access control requirements.
Excellent communication skills with the ability to influence stakeholders at various levels, from engineers to executives.
Demonstrated ability to thrive in ambiguous, fast-paced environments and drive clarity through complexity.
Strong product sense and attention to detail-ability to think through both high-level strategy and nitty-gritty implementation details.

scope.surface: Harvey's Embedded Experiences — Word Add-In, Outlook plugin, Microsoft copilot integrations, and third-party partner integrations (iManage, LexisNexis, SharePoint)
scope.business_model: enterprise B2B SaaS, legal and professional services AI platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Deal velocity and retention from integrations
core_responsibilities: Define and execute the product strategy for Harvey's embedded experiences, including the Word Add-In, Outlook plugin, and copilot integrations across the Microsoft ecosystem and beyond.
Work closely with the Integrations engineering pod and Partnerships team to prioritize, scope, and ship integrations that drive customer value and competitive differentiation.
Define Harvey's external API strategy and developer experience.
Serve as the primary product counterpart for strategic partners (e.g., iManage, LexisNexis, SharePoint).
Collaborate closely with Engineering, Partnerships, GTM, Customer Success, and PMM to ensure ecosystem investments are aligned with commercial strategy and customer needs.
Partner with GTM and Partnerships to translate ecosystem capabilities into sales enablement, positioning, and customer-facing narratives.
Define success metrics for ecosystem health (e.g., integration adoption, API usage, partner-driven revenue) and iterate based on data.

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area — specific integrations named (Word, Outlook, iManage, LexisNexis, SharePoint)
Strong product-market fit signals: 1000+ customers in 60+ countries noted
Defined cross-functional partners and named teams (e.g., Carl Fuda's Partnerships team)
Explicit success metrics described (integration adoption, API usage, partner-driven revenue)
red_flags: No location or remote policy stated — unclear where candidates must be based
High seniority bar (8+ years PM, 3+ years Staff/Senior) may narrow candidate pool significantly

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.manages_people (inferred false — no direct reports mentioned)
